name: Ground Beef with Spaghetti Parmigiana
recipeIngredient: Kernel corn with sweet peppers (12 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare spaghetti in a saucepot as directed on the label; drain. Return spaghetti to the saucepot.
2. In a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat, cook ground beef and onion, stirring occasionally, until all pan juices evaporate and meat is browned. Add corn, tomato sauce, water, salt, pepper, sugar, and cinnamon; heat through.
3. Toss spaghetti with Parmesan cheese and butter or margarine. Arrange spaghetti on a warm platter. Spoon meat mixture over spaghetti.
